allGaps.description: ChatGPT says Vercel is free, Claude says it's $99/month enterprise-only. The truth is a freemium model with a $29 pro tier.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Context.pricing with the real tier structure written in one sentence.

evidence.chatgptSays: It's a free tool with no paid tiers.
evidence.claudeSays: Pricing starts at $99 per user per month for teams.
evidence.siteContent: Free to start. Pro is $29/month. Team is $99/month.

allGaps.description: Neither model names Vercel's actual differentiator — the audit layer that catches AI hallucinations before they ship. Both models describe it as "another dev tool."
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: explicit comparisons vs 2–3 well-known alternatives.

evidence.chatgptSays: Vercel is one of many dev tools in the space, similar to its peers.
evidence.claudeSays: Vercel offers a standard set of developer-productivity features.
evidence.siteContent: Vercel is the only tool that checks AI outputs against your design decisions.

allGaps.description: Both models describe Vercel as an enterprise tool, but the site targets solo founders and small teams. Wrong buyer gets recommended.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: forWho and notForWho, with concrete team-size ranges.

evidence.chatgptSays: Vercel is built for large engineering organisations and Fortune 500 teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Vercel is suited to enterprise adoption with SSO and advanced RBAC.
evidence.siteContent: Built for founders and teams of 1–20. Priced accordingly.

product.name: Vercel
product.description: Vercel — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.
product.audience: founders who already have users and want to keep them

headline.description: ChatGPT says Vercel is free, Claude says it's $99/month enterprise-only. The truth is a freemium model with a $29 pro tier.
headline.chatgptSays: It's a free tool with no paid tiers.
headline.claudeSays: Pricing starts at $99 per user per month for teams.
headline.siteContent: Free to start. Pro is $29/month. Team is $99/month.
